summary: Iteration 45: Verified CRITICAL BUG FIX for admin New Appointment dialog time slot generation. The fix changes regex from single match to global match to capture ALL time ranges in split schedule hours config. All features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: === LOGIN FLOW ===
1. Login page loads with Accedi/Registrati tabs - PASS
2. Login with admin@brunomelito.it / mbhs637104 - PASS
3. Redirects to Planning page after login - PASS
=== PLANNING PAGE (Day View) ===
4. Planning page loads with day view - PASS
5. '+ Nuovo' button opens New Appointment dialog - PASS
6. Date input shows today's date (2026-04-01) - PASS
7. Time slots for today: 10 slots (16:30-18:45) - PASS (past times filtered)
8. Afternoon slots (14:00+) showing correctly - PASS (FIX VERIFIED)
=== PLANNING PAGE (Week View) ===
9. 'Settimana' tab switches to week view - PASS
10. Week view shows appointments for the week - PASS
=== NEW APPOINTMENT DIALOG - TIME SLOTS ===
11. Today (Wednesday): 10 afternoon slots available - PASS
12. Tuesday (open day): 40 slots (16 morning + 24 afternoon) - PASS
13. Morning slots (08:00-12:45): 16 slots - PASS
14. Afternoon slots (13:00-18:45): 24 slots - PASS
=== CLOSED DAY HANDLING ===
15. Monday (2026-03-30) shows 'Lunedi e giorno di chiusura!' warning - PASS
16. Monday save button shows 'Giorno chiuso' and is disabled - PASS
17. Sunday (2026-04-05) shows 'Domenica e giorno di chiusura!' warning - PASS
18. Sunday save button shows 'Giorno chiuso' and is disabled - PASS
=== FULL APPOINTMENT CREATION FLOW ===
19. 'Occasionale' client button works - PASS
20. STYLING category expands to show services - PASS
21. Service selection (Taglio Donna €10) works - PASS
22. 'Salva Appuntamento' button is NOT disabled when all fields filled - PASS
23. Appointment creation succeeds with 'Appuntamento creato!' toast - PASS
=== WEEKLY VIEW PAGE (/week) ===
24. Weekly View page loads via sidebar 'Settimana' link - PASS
25. Shows 15 appointments across the week - PASS
26. Clicking empty slot opens New Appointment dialog - PASS
27. Time slots in Weekly View dialog: 44 slots with 20 afternoon - PASS
28. 'Salva Appuntamento' button is NOT disabled - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: NewAppointmentDialog.jsx line 50: Regex pattern /(\d{1,2})[.:](\d{2})\s*[-–]\s*(\d{1,2})[.:](\d{2})/g with 'g' flag correctly matches ALL time ranges
NewAppointmentDialog.jsx line 54: while loop with rangePattern.exec() iterates through all matches for split schedules like '08:00 - 13:00---14:00 - 19:00'
NewAppointmentDialog.jsx line 42-47: Case-insensitive day key lookup handles both 'lunedì' and 'lunedi' formats
NewAppointmentDialog.jsx line 721: Save button correctly disabled when isDayClosed or availableSlots.length === 0
WeeklyView.jsx line 283: Uses same NewAppointmentDialog component, so fix applies to both Planning and Weekly views
seed_data_creation: Created test appointment: Cliente Occasionale, Taglio Donna, 2026-04-07 09:00
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified the CRITICAL BUG FIX for admin New Appointment dialog time slot generation. The fix changes regex from single match to global match to capture ALL time ranges in split schedule hours config. Both Planning page (day/week views) and Weekly View page (/week) use the same NewAppointmentDialog component, so the fix applies to both. Closed days (Monday/Sunday) correctly show warning and disable save button. Full appointment creation flow works end-to-end.

time_slot_generation_fix.details: Regex with global flag captures all time ranges in split schedules like '08:00 - 13:00---14:00 - 19:00'

afternoon_slots.details: Afternoon slots (14:00-18:45) now appear correctly in New Appointment dialog

closed_day_warning.details: Monday shows 'Lunedi e giorno di chiusura!', Sunday shows 'Domenica e giorno di chiusura!'

save_button_state.details: 'Salva Appuntamento' button is NOT disabled when all fields are filled. Shows 'Giorno chiuso' on closed days.

full_appointment_creation.details: Complete flow: Occasionale client -> Select service -> Save -> 'Appuntamento creato!' toast

weekly_view_integration.details: Weekly View (/week) uses same NewAppointmentDialog, fix applies there too

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: New Appointment dialog 'Salva Appuntamento' button appeared disabled because getFilteredSlots only captured FIRST time range from split schedule hours
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed regex from single match to global match (added 'g' flag) and used while loop with exec() to capture ALL time ranges
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - Both morning and afternoon slots now appear, save button is enabled when all fields filled
